items.name: Alisher Karimov
items.text: OnlineAcademy transformed my career. The courses are practical, engaging, and taught by real professionals.

items.name: Maria Petrova
items.text: I went from zero to landing my first design job in just 3 months. The platform is incredibly well-structured.

items.name: Bobur Toshmatov
items.text: The multilingual support is a game changer. I can learn in my native language and switch to English for practice.

items.name: Sofia Ivanova
items.text: Outstanding quality content. Each course is meticulously crafted with real-world projects and hands-on exercises.
